examples: He was struck by a stabbing pain in his midriff.
There wasn't even a midriff on display.
Young American women believe that a bare midriff is fashionable.
But still top of the pops is Ian Carson with that old classic "Midriff crisis".
With young Gemma Arterton in a bare-midriff role, as Princess Tamina, guardian of the all-powerful knife.
